title: Canada overhauls immigration consultant regulations
summary_en: The Canadian government has announced new rules for immigration consultants including increased penalties, an expanded public register and compensation for victims of dishonest acts.
author: Polly Nash

title: Emerging Futures 9: visa uncertainty reshapes student demand globally
summary_en: More international students are ruling out study destinations earlier because of visa uncertainty, costs and a lack of clarity about what an application will involve, according to new global research from IDP Education.
author: Kim Martin
title_cn: Emerging Futures 9: visa uncertainty reshapes student demand globally

title: Study Group sold to Arete Education
summary_en: Study Group has been acquired by Arete Education, the higher education venture backed by Global University Systems (GUS) and Brightstar Capital Partners.
author: Kim Martin
title_cn: Study Group sold to Arete Education

title: South Korea in post-study visa push amid shift towards quality
summary_en: After surpassing its “Study Korea 300K” target ahead of schedule, South Korea says it now wants to shift focus towards “strategic quality management”, post-graduation opportunities and long-term talent retention.
author: Abhishek Nair
title_cn: South Korea in post-study visa push amid shift towards quality

title: Jacqui Smith: UK universities must prove local value
summary_en: The UK minister for skills, Baroness Jacqui Smith, has reiterated the government’s support for international education, while urging universities to do more to combat public scepticism of higher education.
author: Polly Nash
title_cn: Jacqui Smith: UK universities must prove local value

title: The PIEoneer Awards 2026 shortlist revealed
summary_en: The shortlist for The PIEoneer Awards 2026 has been revealed, marking a major milestone as the international education sector’s flagship event celebrates its 10th anniversary this year.
author: The PIE News team
